case_title: CHERYL B. KING VS. EMPEROR MANAGEMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING, CHERYL B. AS TO DEFENDANT EMPEROR MANAGEMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, CHERYL B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMPEROR MANAGEMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $84,939.56 PRINCIPAL, $501.84 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $85,811.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
